name: GAF_GenAI_UpdateAsset_Tool_v1
description: Update an existing Tool or Agent in Infor OS GenAI.
instructions: Update an existing asset. FULL REPLACEMENT - provide complete specification. Steps: 1. Fetch current spec with GetAsset. 2. Modify needed fields. 3. Call this tool with complete spec. Required: guid (EXISTING asset GUID), name, instructions, type (API_DOCS for tools, TOOLKIT for agents), data. WARNING: Missing fields will be cleared. Returns: guid, name, type.

data.api_docs:
Method: PUT
Endpoint: /api/v1/tools
Headers: Content-Type: application/json
Body: JSON object (single tool/agent) with the complete updated specification. Required fields: guid (string, REQUIRED for update - identifies asset to update), name (string), instructions (string), type (string), data (object). IMPORTANT: This is full replacement semantics. All fields must be provided; missing fields will be cleared.
Example request:
PUT /api/v1/tools
Body: {"guid":"existing-guid","name":"GAF_Product_Capability_Tool_v1","instructions":"Updated instructions","type":"API_DOCS","data":{}}
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with the updated tool/agent object. Example success response: {"guid":"existing-guid","name":"Updated_Tool_Name","type":"API_DOCS"}. HTTP 404 indicates asset not found. HTTP 422 indicates validation failure.

CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE:
---DEBUG---
FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
---END DEBUG---
